submission.title: Looking for more recs :D Really looking for royalty theme with magic typa stuff

comments.body:
-The God of Pains Groom (Arrange marriage, about gods)
-Escape, Ray (telekinetic powers)
-Salvation (uke time traveled, abt kings prophecy)
-Conrad (abt dragons,knights)
-Hwanghyeon Text/ The Words in your Snare (mc has the ability to read other people's thoughts and feelings as written text)
-Love of Cloud and Rain (dragon king traveled to the human realm)
-One Step from hell (abt demons and contracts)

I read it quite a while back, so I apologize for any inaccuracies, hope this helps 🙂
It's oka 🤭🤭 some of them sound really interesting, but the reviews say otherwise🤔🤔 if theres no SA scenes, life is good🥰

submission.title: Looking for non smut recommendations
submission.body:
I’ve read a bunch but haven’t he able to fine one in a little to sink into 

I’ll list all the ones I’ve read it could help someone find one i haven’t read and can also be recommendations 

Half of me,Lemon lighting,for your love,Lousy side top,Uncanny Charm,Don’t say you love me,luckily luck,Rejoice in enemies,Fake slackers,Best left unwritten,My first love is a guy,Hope you’ve been well,Downpour,Touch your world,Too close,My hot friend is glowing,Sematic error,Star x fanboy,Killer crush,Virtual Strangers,Our youth,

I believe all of these are non smut but if some are that’s my bad, feel free to use them as recommendations I recommend them all, if you have a manga/Manhwa you think I’ll like please recommend me it.

comments.body:
Between the stars, the shape of your love & spinach bouquet (only smut in sidestories)

My delicious dream boy (same author as dont say you love me)

Countdown to love, netkama punch, candy man, reunion (only smut in one exttra after season two), love interest zone, dream away, plum candy love 

The easiest thing u can do is just look for Shounen Ai or manhua in general

Okay thank you very much 
I’ll give these all a try

I’d say the following have little to no smut, if they do its in the side story or its censored. 

Here U Are

At The End of the Road

19 Days

Never Understand

Heesu in Class 2

Fools

Unintentional Love Story

Lost in the Cloud

Salad Days

Love Tractor

Heaven Official’s Blessing

Little Mushroom

Top recommendations ❤️ I would say the same…. I would also add salad days, lost in the clouds, semantic error, love tractor, unchanny charm, killer crush, RobberxLover (sorry if I repeated some you have already read) let me know if you need more recommendations. I usually prioritize plot story than smut 😊😊

Salad days, uncanny charm & love tractor, my beloved! The uncanny charm sidestory is sooooooo sweet!!
Definitely agree! The rest as well, top picks!

submission.title: Angsty bl manhwa's (hurt-comfort)
submission.body: Already posted this on blmanhwa and boys love.. got no response on blmanhwa and got it deleted on bl. I need some ANGSTY, like heart breaking angst trauma for the mc. Like hurt/comfort kinda thing. And for the ml to treat the mc well, like no gr@pe from the ml or anything like that, it doesnt specifically have to be a green flag but it would be appriciated. Also for the ml to have emotions.. read a lot of angsty stuff and the ml was almost always this emotionless perfect dude and its soo boring. So yeah love some ptsd or just really really deep angst or past, maybe some healing journey and fluff/comfort! My fav bl manhwa is low tide in twilight (obviously its just my everything) and i also LOVE stigma (by marloong) its my second fav, also marrying man (the ml was eh but it is what it is..) is great or lost in the clouds for the angst, trope and psychological part, but i HATE HATE HATE Cirrus that bitch is a fucking red flag with his past actions to Skylar, and he litellary sa'd Skylar tf.. so i hope this "list" helps a lil.. (my second fav along with stigma is bj alex but thats not really the trope im going for at all so..), cant really remember other manhwa's so ill add more after if that helps! Also read a lot of angsty bl manga's but again dont remember names. Gosh this is the most serious thing ive written in months.. i love laughing about peoples angst's

comments.body:
MADK comes to mind for me. Waaaay more hurt than comfort if I'm honest. There is rape, not *by* the ml, but it is kinda, like, prompted by him, for lack of a better term and it's... entirely the ML's fault. And I think that happens twice to two different people (don't take my word for it' it's been a while since I've read it).  
 
I sobbed like a baby at a few parts. Especially the end. Enjoy.
[deleted]

I haven't read it yet myself but '10 Years I Loved You The Most' has that angst you're looking for, I'm not sure about the comfort part, the ML or if it has any SA because I'm just going off on what I've heard about it but you could give it a try!

I recommend that one as well!

It has SA tho, but as an "important part of the story" (without spoiling too much, it's also not graphic at least) 

~~still havent recovered myself~~
Read that one already, i loved itt! Even tho the ending was.. yeah i enjoy the angst (THIS SOUNDS TERRIBLE BUT WTV) and sometimes love a bad ending! Tysm tho ill probably reread it!
NEVER READ THAT! TYSM ILL DEFINETLY READ IT! :33

It definitely starts off toxic and with the LI bullying the main character but I don’t remember there being any assault in it. (I could be wrong though so I would recommend double checking if need be ) but I LOVED “Never Understand” by Bbong. Genuinely read the whole thing in one night. If I remember correctly the first few chapters start off a bit rough but the art and story develop sooo well. I loved the angst and slow burn comfort of this series.

submission.title: Best bl manhwa authors
submission.body:
So I did do a post of this before but on yaoi fluff and the was apparently deleted as was my post.

So, I’m doing another but on this sub this time.

I’m looking for the best bl authors that fo green flag relationships and amazing plots.

Two authors I really love are Brothers without a tomorrow. 

Park ji-yeon (Creator of wolf in the house, and monumentum)

I love their stories, their stories are really detailed and beautiful and intimate in every way.

But please give me authors that create such beautiful green flag bl manhwa and story telling with the beautiful intimacy (No stories cheating between main couple please)

Please let me know, please and thank you😁

comments.body: Moscareto

1.Fargo (Love is an Illusion, Hate Mate, If you hate me so)
2.Nabit (Til our lips touch, My bias is showing)
3.Sireu (Fate Mate, Hold me tight)
